title: Chormah #2767
definition:
Hormah = "devotion"

 1) a town of the Canaanites, conquered by Joshua, allotted to Judah,
    and located in the south of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hormah = "devotion"

 1) a town of the Canaanites, conquered by Joshua, allotted to Judah,
    and located in the south of Judah

    NASB:  asylum, a place in Simeon
